title: [codereview-pass2] coap_dtn.c stubs instead of SenML DTN implementation
description: lichen/subsys/lichen/coap/coap_dtn.c:12-20 - All handlers are empty stubs returning 0; no senml_encode call despite include at line 8. Violates spec/12-apps.md:1211 requiring SenML CBOR (ct=112) for /deaddrop and /confessions. Compare to coap_location.c:123 which uses senml_encode_location. No raw memcpy but also no encoding at all. discovered-from:project-LICHEN-pp9k
